# @platform/adapters-object-storage

Object storage adapter: AWS S3 client, presigned URL generation, and storage-runtime interface implementation.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-object-storage
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-object-storage
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: object-storage
Owner: team-adapter
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-adapter
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Implement the storage-runtime upload and retrieval interface using the AWS S3 SDK
- Generate presigned upload and download URLs with configurable TTLs
- Enforce bucket naming conventions and access policies
- Handle S3 multipart upload for large files

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define the storage interface (owned by storage-runtime)
- Does not own content validation, virus scanning, or CDN configuration
- Does not manage S3 bucket lifecycle policies or replication rules

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Registered at application startup as the concrete storage provider
- Feature packages request presigned URLs through the storage-runtime interface


## Operational notes

- AWS credentials are resolved from the instance role or config-runtime ? never hardcoded
- Bucket names and regions are resolved from config-runtime
